title: Synapse Agent-Facing API Manifest
description: Catalog of API endpoints specifically designed for Synapse agents to contribute to and retrieve context from the Knowledge Portal.

endpoints.description: Submit a new knowledge proposal. Context (project, agent, tech) is now handled via the 'tags' array.

label.description: Short, descriptive name for the knowledge node.

content.description: The main body of knowledge (will be stored in node properties).

type.description: The category/class of the knowledge node.

tags.description: Contextual tags (e.g., 'project:synapse', 'agent:winston', 'tech:nextjs@14'). Use '@' to specify version.

endpoints.description: Export JIT context. Use tags for filtering to retrieve nodes related to a specific project, technology, or agent.

tags.description: List of tags to match (OR condition). Format: 'scope:name' or just 'name'.

endpoints.description: Increment the efficacy (success count) of an existing knowledge node when it is successfully applied.

nodeId.description: The UUID of the knowledge node that was applied successfully.
